EmailTemplate.name: Ascension-EmailTemplate-TerminationAdvanceNotification-Amita
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $styleSheet ) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end ASCENSION ACCESS MANAGEMENT (AAM) USER PENDING EXPIRATION NOTICE

Urgent action is required to prevent service disruption for one or more of your sponsored users.

The following users are due to expire within 30 days.

To renew, please review and update position details and expiration date on each user identity record in AAM.Instructions.

If an individual is still in need of user access, but is now managed by someone else, please update the user identity record in AAM. using the "Modify Associate/Contractor" screen to reflect the correct manager. The new manager will receive a request to approve the reassignment. If the person requires access, but you do not know the person's current manager of record, please submit an incident ticket to the service desk and ask them to assign it to the Identity Governance team for further assistance.

For individuals formerly with AMITA Health now employed by AdventHealth, please reference this document for the latest information: Instructions.

To end all system access immediately, please use the above link and update end date to today's date. A ServiceNow request will be issued automatically to process your update.

If the below information is correct, no further action is needed. User access will be disabled once the end date has elapsed.

#if($recordList) #foreach ($listElement in $recordList) #end #end
Name NetworkId Email Job Title Company End Date
$!listElement.get("userLname"), $!listElement.get("userFname") $!listElement.get("networkId") $!listElement.get("email") $!listElement.get("userJobTitle") $!listElement.get("userCompany") $!listElement.get("userEndDate")

Thank you,
The IAM Operations Team

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying Manager Ascension Termination Advance Notification.
EmailTemplate.Subject: AAM User Expiration Notice for $!managerLname, $!managerFname
